title: Add Skillful Actor negative benchmarks
description: Add benchmark coverage for the failure modes that would make v5.0 fake: missing skill evidence, weak actor assignment, stale release state, policy-bypassed allocation, missing resource claim, and output contract mismatch.
triage_notes: Completed TASK-053: skillful-actor-benchmark now runs SAB-001 through SAB-006 negative checks for missing skill evidence, weak actor assignment, missing resource claim, policy-bypassed allocation, stale release state, and output contract mismatch; runtime proof written to /tmp/aof-task053-skillful-actor-benchmark.json.
